tap.name: Tap Together
tap.description: Tap the block with your partner, clear rounds, and earn points for shop upgrades.
rules: This game is only for couples with a linked partner in settings.
At the start of a round, both can tap immediately — no need to wait.
The next round starts when both finish their part (e.g. 15/15).
Each new round requires 3× more taps.
Points are awarded for each tap and for completing a round — round rewards grow with difficulty.
Spend points in the shop on tools that speed up progress.
Quad and mega tap unlock after round 5 — 15 boosted taps each (×4 and ×10).
The leaderboard ranks pairs by total taps.

play.tapBlockDoneAria: You already finished your part of the round

geo.name: Guess the Location
geo.description: Guess where the place is on the map and compete with other couples.
rules: This game is only for couples with a linked partner.
Before each round, both press Ready — then a 3-second countdown and one round starts.
Each round has a time limit — each partner places their own marker on the map.
The closer the marker to the real spot, the more points; both partners' scores are summed.
Each confirms only their own marker — two independent guesses per round.
Up to 5 locations per day; the limit resets the next day.
When all 200 locations are done, the pool starts over.
The leaderboard ranks pairs by total score across all rounds.

play.dailyAllDoneBody: You completed all 5 locations. New ones tomorrow.
play.dailyGuessedAll: You guessed {{count}} places today. New rounds tomorrow.
play.restartGame: Go back to the game description and start again.
play.restartHint: When all 200 locations are done, the pool starts over.
play.timedOutNoGuess: Time's up — no one placed a marker in time
play.markerSentWaiting: Your marker was sent. Waiting for your partner...
play.markerHint: Tap the map to place your marker
play.markerHintBoth: Each places their own marker. Both partners' scores are added.

draw.name: Guess the Drawing
draw.description: One draws, the other guesses — like Gartic, but for your couple.
rules: This game is only for couples with a linked partner.
Before each round, both press Ready — then a 3-second countdown and start.
Artist and guesser swap each round.
90 seconds per round: one draws, the other can guess while drawing continues.
The faster you guess, the more points.
Up to 10 scored rounds per day count for the leaderboard — then play for fun.

play.dailyLimitDialogBodyFull: Points count for only 10 games per day. You can keep playing for fun — guesses still count, but points won't affect the leaderboard.
play.limitExhaustedToast: Points count for only 10 games per day. Today's limit is reached — play for fun.

quiz.name: Your Own Game
quiz.description: A game board with categories and questions — answer together and score points.
rules: This game is only for couples with a linked partner.
Before the board, both press Ready — then a 3-second countdown and start.
First turn is random between partners, then turns alternate.
On your turn, pick any cell: category and value. 30 seconds to answer.
Each enters one answer. Correct answers earn the cell value (100, 200, or 300).
If both are correct, points are summed. Played cells cannot be picked again.
Each day — 5 random categories and a new question set (15 cells).
After all questions, the board refreshes the next day.
The leaderboard ranks pairs by total score.

rules.title: Chat rules
rules.summary: Amorely is for couples to communicate within applicable law. Harassment, threats, illegal content, and other misuse of chat features are prohibited. By tapping "Agree", you confirm that you have read the rules and agree to follow them.

unlock.title: Set up your secret phrase
unlock.description:
As the owner of Amorely, I cannot read your messages or view your events.

This is by design so you can be sure your content stays private.

To make this work, you need to create a secret phrase and save it in another messenger or a notebook.

Important: if you lose it, we cannot recover your data — chat messages, or text and media in the calendar.
unlock.copyFailed: Could not copy. Select the phrase and copy it manually.
unlock.passphraseMinWords: The secret phrase must contain at least {{min}} words. Your phrase has {{count}} words
unlock.deviceConnected: Device connected. Save the phrase in a safe place — you will need it on other devices.
unlock.accessRestored: Access restored. You can use the app now.
unlock.confirmTitle: Are you sure you saved your phrase?
